metadata.description: ECC 2026 Calendar of Events - RISE Year 01: Foundation & Readiness
metadata.organization: East Caribbean Conference of Seventh-day Adventists
metadata.address: Bryden's Avenue, Brittons Hill, St. Michael, Barbados

events.Title: Consecration Service (Pastors, Elders, Deacons)
events.Description: Annual consecration service for church leaders including pastors, elders, and deacons in Dominica. Part of the RISE strategy for spiritual renewal.

events.Title: Communion with God – Hour of Prayer
events.Description: Monthly hour of prayer session for spiritual connection and communion with God. Part of the RISE strategy for spiritual renewal.

events.Description: Global initiative of 10 consecutive days of united prayer across all SDA churches. A time of spiritual focus and revival.

events.Title: Launch of RISE Health
